question: Why was Rio de Janeiro governor Wilson Witzel impeached in April 2021?
ground_truth: He was impeached due to accusations of irregularities in the hiring of field hospitals to combat the coronavirus pandemic.
event_desc: The impeachment of Rio de Janeiro governor Wilson Witzel is unanimously approved, after being accused of irregularities in the hiring of field hospitals to combat the coronavirus pandemic . The former judge will have his political rights suspended for 5 years and the acting governor, Cláudio Castro, will take over the position permanently.
